ch6_start.text: The corridor freezes. Your arm itches. PA static: Sector B bulkhead integrity critical — then a wet roar on the sensors. Sector B is flooding. Anything you left down there is gone.

ch6_hub.text: Upper decks only. Sector B is a tomb of seawater and alarms. Where do you go?

ch6_sector_b_flooded.text: Through the viewport: black water, floating crates, a hardhat turning slowly like a planet. If Miller left proof in the lower shafts, the ocean has it now.

ch6_hydro.text: Hydroponics filters glow faintly. Same wrong light. The flood has not reached here — yet the spores have.

choices.text: Bag a sample if you lack one.

ch6_chloe_quarters.text: Chloe's bunk is a pharmacy. Empty sedative bottles. No natural sleep since the breach — only chemical silence.

ch6_comms_tower.text: Chloe huddles in the corner. The console broadcasts Miller — calm, wet, impossible. 'It's so cold... why did you leave me in the dark...'
ch6_comms_tower.speaker: Miller (Radio)

textVariants.text: Chloe huddles in the corner. Miller's voice pours from the console — and from inside your skull. 'It's so cold... why did you leave me in the dark...'

choices.text: 'Miller is dead. That is not him.'
Check the relay logs while the voice talks.

ch6_relay_log.text: Relay history: an emergency channel manually muted the night the drill team died. Chloe's credentials.

ch6_chloe_breakdown.text: Chloe covers her ears. 'I deleted the first distress call! I thought it was a prank. Now they won't stop talking to me.'
ch6_chloe_breakdown.speaker: Chloe

choices.text: Present the ghost audio file if you have it.
Present empty prescription bottles — she is breaking.

ch6_with_audio.text: Hearing the recording breaks her. She hands you a second encrypted file without being asked. 'I listen every night so I don't forget what I did.'
ch6_with_audio.speaker: Chloe

ch6_with_rx.text: She stares at the bottles. 'I hear them when I sleep. So I don't sleep.' Her hands stop shaking long enough to help you kill the console power.
ch6_with_rx.speaker: Chloe

ch6_shutdown.text: Silence. Your arm shows it: veins faint black. The infection is no longer theoretical.

choices.text: Seek medical help in Medbay now.

ch6_radio_off.text: Comms is handled. Sector B is lost. The veins under your skin keep their own schedule.
